description: Template for recording MJU-DRP SharePoint permission group information

groups.name: DRP Owners
groups.description: Site owners with full administrative access

groups.name: DRP Editors
groups.description: Editors who can upload and modify documents

groups.name: DRP Reviewers
groups.description: Reviewers who can edit metadata and approve content

groups.name: DRP External Readers
groups.description: External stakeholders with limited read access

groups.name: DRP API Access
groups.description: Service accounts and API clients with read-only access

notes: Permission groups require member assignment after site creation
Library-level permissions should be configured after groups are created
Replace __PLACEHOLDER__ values after site is provisioned
